description_long: This is a large, rectangular wooden shelving unit composed of two distinct sections. The left section features wide, horizontal shelves with open fronts, ideal for storing flat or bulky items. The right section consists of a grid of smaller, square cubbyholes, each open at the front, suitable for organizing smaller objects. The entire structure is constructed from light-colored plywood with visible wood grain and reinforced at the corners with dark joinery. The top surface is flat and continuous, providing additional space for placing items. There are no visible doors, handles, or glass panels, and the open design allows for easy access to all compartments.
description: A large, light wood shelving unit with open shelves and cubbyholes, featuring a flat top and visible wood grain.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide shelves on the left and the grid of cubbyholes on the right.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the depth and solid wood panels of the shelving unit.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the open backs of the shelves and cubbyholes.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the depth and the stacked shelf structure.
